title: Kyiv: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains...
title_en: Kyiv: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains...
title_uk: Київ: через десять років після вбивства журналіста Павла Шеремета справедливість залишається...
description: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains out of reach A decade after the murder of Belarusian-born journalist Pavel Sheremet in a car bombing in central Kyiv, justice remains elusive. The prosecution's case has unraveled under criticism, the three accused have been released, and proceedings are frozen until the end of Russia's full-scale war — when the trial is expected...
description_en: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains out of reach A decade after the murder of Belarusian-born journalist Pavel Sheremet in a car bombing in central Kyiv, justice remains elusive. title: 🛰Russia did launch a new set of satellites for its "analog Starlink"...
title_en: 🛰Russia did launch a new set of satellites for its "analog Starlink"...

description: 🛰Russia did launch a new set of satellites for its "analog Starlink" Russian "Bureau 1440" reported on the second launch of the devices of the low-orbital communication system "Rassvet". The company does not disclose how many satellites were sent into orbit this time. As a reminder, the first full batch of 16 satellites was launched back in March. After that, there is practically no news about the deployment of the system...
description_en: 🛰Russia did launch a new set of satellites for its "analog Starlink" Russian "Bureau 1440" reported on the second launch of the devices of the low-orbital communication system "Rassvet". The company does not disclose how many satellites were sent into orbit this time. As a reminder, the first full batch of 16 satellites was launched back in March. After that, there is practically no news about the deployment of the system...
description_uk: 🛰русня таки запустила новую пачку спутников для своего «аналоговнетного Starlink» российское «Бюро 1440» отчиталось о втором запуске аппаратов низкоорбитальной системы связи «Рассвет». Сколько именно спутников отправили на орбиту в этот раз компания не раскрывает. Напомним, первую полноценную партию из 16 спутников запустили еще в марте. После этого новостей о развертывании системы практически не...

description: Lockheed Martin reveals cheaper Patriot air defense interceptor amid surging global demand. The new Patriot PAC-3 Adapted Capability Effector, known as PAC-3 ACE, will cost less than half as much as the existing PAC-3 MSE interceptor, according to Lockheed Martin.

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Up to 145 Russian troops remain in Kostiantynivka as Ukrainian forces hold defense, military says. The Kostiantynivka sector remains one of the most intense areas of the front, with Russian forces launching up to 20 attacks a day and continuing attempts to infiltrate deeper into the city, according to Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi.

description: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir Starmer officially left the post of Prime Minister of Great Britain 👥 King Charles III accepted Starmer's resignation and officially appointed Burnham as the head of the government. 💬 Earlier, Burnham stated that he would maintain the current level of support for Ukraine. He also stressed that Great Britain lives in an increasingly dangerous world

Він також наголошував, що Велика Британія живе у дедалі небезпечнішому світі

During his visit, Kyiv suffered another massive Russian missile and drone attack. No briefing can convey the reality of this war...

Під час його візиту Київ зазнав чергової масованої російської ракетно-дронової атаки. Жоден брифінг не здатен передати реальність цієї війни...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: From July 1 to July 19, the Russian army used two-thirds of the planned yearly production of Zircons for attacks on Ukraine. At the same time, the total number of ballistic missiles used by the Russian Federation exceeded the total monthly volume of their production, reported the Ukrainian profile publication "Milytarny". So, according to the calculations of the authors of the publication, taking into account the massive strike on the night of July 19, Russia since the beginning of the month...

So, according to the calculations of the authors of the publication, taking into account the massive strike on the night of July 19, Russia since the beginning of the month...
description_uk: С 1 по 19 июля армия РФ использовала для ударов по Украине две трети запланированного годового производства "Цирконов" При этом общее количество примененных РФ баллистических ракет превысило совокупный месячный объем их производства, сообщило украинское профильное издание "Милитарный". Так, по подсчетам авторов издания, с учетом массированного удара в ночь на 19 июля, Россия с начала месяца...

title: Crimea: Energy infrastructure hit
title_en: Crimea: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Ukrainian drones strike 7 Russian shadow fleet vessels, power facilities in occupied Crimea, military says. Three tankers and four dry cargo ships were hit in the Black and Azov seas as part of Operation “MoLoCHKa,” according to Unmanned Systems Forces Commander Robert Brovdi.

Дякую воїнам Сил безпілотних систем, розвідки, ракетних військ і артилерії, Сил спеціальних операцій. Відстань до цілей від нашого кордону – понад 400 кілометрів. Також в акваторії Чорного моря уражено два танкери тіньового флоту та чотири суховантажі. Справедливо відповідаємо на кожен...

title: 400 missiles
title_en: 400 missiles
description: "Iskander" will be detected more easily than the S-400 missile: why the alarm is sometimes announced almost at the moment of impact The S-400 anti-missile missiles fly at a much lower altitude and have a very short flight time, so the air alert is sometimes announced almost simultaneously with the impact. This was told by the military observer, a participant in the Russian-Ukrainian war, Aleksey Hetman. 💬 "Iskander" is...
description_en: "Iskander" will be detected more easily than the S-400 missile: why the alarm is sometimes announced almost at the moment of impact The S-400 anti-missile missiles fly at a much lower altitude and have a very short flight time, so the air alert is sometimes announced almost simultaneously with the impact. This was told by the military observer, a participant in the Russian-Ukrainian war, Aleksey Hetman. 💬 "Iskander" is...
description_uk: "Искандер" обнаружить легче, чем ракету С-400: почему тревогу иногда объявляют почти в момент удара Ракеты к ЗРК С-400 летят на значительно более низкой высоте и имеют очень короткое время подлета, поэтому воздушную тревогу иногда объявляют практически одновременно с ударом. Об этом рассказал военный обозреватель, участник российско-украинской войны Алексей Гетьман. 💬 «Искандер» – это...
